summary: Added brightnessctl to the niri package group in modules/system/packages.nix and bound XF86MonBrightnessUp/XF86MonBrightnessDown to brightnessctl in config/config.kdl after the existing wpctl audio binds. No udev rule, video group, or hardware.brightnessctl module was added, per plan (logind SetBrightness fallback). Verified with nix flake check and nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa; brightnessctl confirmed present in the built closure.

artifacts.summary: Added brightnessctl to the Niri essential packages group
Added XF86MonBrightnessUp/Down binds after the existing wpctl audio binds

completion_data.completion_summary: Installed brightnessctl in the niri package group and bound XF86MonBrightnessUp/Down to brightnessctl set 5%+/5%- (with a -n 5% floor) in config/config.kdl, verified via nix flake check and nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa.

next_steps: Manual user step: after nixos-rebuild switch and logging into the niri session, press brightness keys to confirm the eDP-1 panel visibly dims/brightens, and spot-check volume/mute keys still work.
